subcodes.first_line: I testify, even as the Wronged One hath testified, that there is none other God but Him, Who hath ever been sanctified beyond the mention of all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بما شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن ذکر الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @absolute freedom; independence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
